'''Jess Harnell''' (born [[December 23]], [[1960s#1963|1963]]) is an American voice actor who provided voices for several ''Star Wars'' enterprises.

==Roles==
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles]]'' – [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]]
*''[[Star Wars: Demolition]]'' – [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]], [[Malakili/Legends|Malakili]]
*''[[Star Wars: Obi-Wan (video game)]]'' – [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] Thug, Ki-Adi-Mundi, Wounded [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] Soldier
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – Darth Maul, [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] bolo trooper, Hannoon soldier, [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|STAP]] driver
**''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]'' – [[IG-88D/Legends|IG-88]], Ki-Adi-Mundi, [[Stam Reath]]
*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] – [[Ric Olié/Legends|Ric Olié]], Pirate Ground Forces
*''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' – Darth Maul
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' – Gran 1, [[Rogue Leader/Legends|Rogue Leader]]
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' – Additional voices
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]'' – Gran, [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]]

He also voiced Officer Demon Mott in the fan film ''TROOPS'' and had a role in ''[http://www.imdb.com/title/tt0361462/combined Comic Book: The Movie]'' with [[Mark Hamill]].
